_comment: A/B hero image specs for Micro:bit Remote Builder (rxy). 1500×1500 Etsy thumbnails. Features: drag-drop Bluetooth remote builder, 12 widgets, 6 templates, 5 themes, auto-generated MakeCode, V1 + V2 support, trilingual.

heroes.name: hero-teacher
heroes.title:
Drag. Drop. Drive.
No Code.
heroes.subtitle: 12 widgets · 6 templates · auto-generated MakeCode · V1 AND V2 supported

heroes.name: hero-kid
heroes.title:
Build your own
Bluetooth remote.
heroes.subtitle: Drag a D-Pad. Drop a slider. Pick a template. Your micro:bit responds live.

heroes.title:

Auto-Generated MakeCode.
heroes.subtitle: Button · Slider · Joystick · D-Pad · XY Pad · Gauge · Graph · Battery · Timer…
heroes.footerLeft: Works on micro:bit V1 AND V2 (rare)

heroes.name: hero-laptop

Flash the board.
heroes.subtitle: One click → paste-ready MakeCode JS → download hex → drag to micro:bit.
